message:
Command `# Now let's try to compile the smoke TB with iverilog
PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
DESIGN_ROOT="$PROJECT_ROOT/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
SOCGEN_TMP="$PROJECT_ROOT/.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp"

# First test compile using the tb filelist
cd "$DESIGN_ROOT/tb"
iverilog -g2005-sv -Wall \
  -f "$DESIGN_ROOT/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f" \
  -f "$DESIGN_ROOT/filelists/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f" \
  -o /tmp/smoke_test \
  2>&1 | head -50
echo "EXIT: $?"` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# Now let's try to compile the smoke TB with iverilog
PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
DESIGN_ROOT="$PROJECT_ROOT/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
SOCGEN_TMP="$PROJECT_ROOT/.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp"

# First test compile using the tb filelist
cd "$DESIGN_ROOT/tb"
iverilog -g2005-sv -Wall \
  -f "$DESIGN_ROOT/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f" \
  -f "$DESIGN_ROOT/filelists/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f" \
  -o /tmp/smoke_test \
  2>&1 | head -50
echo "EXIT: $?""}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
# Now let's try to compile the smoke TB with iverilog
PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
DESIGN_ROOT="$PROJECT_ROOT/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
SOCGEN_TMP="$PROJECT_ROOT/.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp"

# First test compile using the tb filelist
cd "$DESIGN_ROOT/tb"
iverilog -g2005-sv -Wall \
  -f "$DESIGN_ROOT/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f" \
  -f "$DESIGN_ROOT/filelists/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f" \
  -o /tmp/smoke_test \
  2>&1 | head -50
echo "EXIT: $?"
